# Archive — Original TASVS Format

This directory contains the original TASVS (Thick Application Security Verification Standard) content as published in September 2024.

These files are preserved for historical reference only. The current standard is maintained in `1.0/en/` using the ASVS 5.0.0 format under the TCASVS name.

**Do not edit these files.** For the active standard, see [`../1.0/en/`](../1.0/en/).
